name: Paisaje Protegido Serra del Maigmó y Serra del Sit — Circular desde Sax
region_intro: Mountain biking around Sax, located in Alicante, Spain, offers a diverse range of terrains suitable for various skill levels. The region is characterized by varied landscapes, including challenging ascents, technical sections, and extensive trail networks through forests and narrow paths. Riders can explore areas with unique rock formations, mountain meadows, and scenic views. This makes Sax a destination with options for both leisurely rides and more demanding mountain bike trails. Best mountain bike trails around Sax The most popular mountain bike trail is Paisaje Protegido Serra del Maigmó y Serra del Sit — Circular desde Sax, a 34.1 miles (55.0 km) difficult trail that takes 5 hours 43 minutes to complete. This route features significant elevation gain through protected natural landscapes. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Almortxó Sand Dunes – Las Hermosas loop from Sax, a moderate 21.6 miles (34.8 km) path. This trail offers a mix of terrain, including sand dunes and scenic natural areas. Local mountain bikers also love the Colonia de Santa Eulalia – El Plano loop from Sax, a 20.5 miles (33.1 km) trail leading through varied landscapes, often completed in about 1 hour 56 minutes. Mountain biking around Sax is defined by diverse terrains, including forests, rock formations, and narrow paths. The network offers options for different ability levels, from easy loops to challenging ascents. The routes in Sax are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 30 reviews. More than 300 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Sax's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are there around Sax?
A: There are over 40 mountain bike trails around Sax, offering a diverse range of experiences. These include 9 easy routes, 18 moderate routes, and 13 difficult routes, catering to various skill levels.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails around Sax?
A: Mountain biking around Sax, Alicante, offers varied landscapes, including challenging ascents, technical sections, and extensive trail networks through forests and narrow paths. You'll encounter areas with unique rock formations, mountain meadows, and scenic views. Some routes, like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38283196" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Almortxó Sand Dunes – Las Hermosas loop from Sax&lt;/a&gt;, even feature sand dunes.

Q: Are there any easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Sax?
A: Yes, Sax offers 9 easy mountain bike routes perfect for beginners or those looking for a more relaxed ride. An example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27639200" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Colonia de Santa Eulalia – El Plano loop from Sax&lt;/a&gt;, which is 20.5 miles (33.1 km) long and leads through varied landscapes.

Q: What are some notable natural landmarks or viewpoints I can see along the trails?
A: The trails around Sax offer access to several natural landmarks and viewpoints. You can explore the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3526393" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Almortxó Sand Dunes&lt;/a&gt;, the impressive &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3004011" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Stone Arch of Elda-Petrer&lt;/a&gt;, or the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/658102" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pocico Alonso&lt;/a&gt;. For panoramic views, consider routes that pass near &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3072247" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Silla del Cid Summit&lt;/a&gt; or &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1092896" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Despeñador Peak&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there any challenging mountain bike routes for experienced riders?
A: Absolutely. Sax has 13 difficult mountain bike routes designed for experienced riders seeking a challenge. A prime example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e927500384/paisaje-protegido-serra-del-maigmo-y-serra-del-sit-circular-desde-sax" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Paisaje Protegido Serra del Maigmó y Serra del Sit — Circular desde Sax&lt;/a&gt;, a 34.1-mile (55.0 km) trail with significant elevation gain through protected natural landscapes.

Q: Are there any long-distance mountain bike loops around Sax?
A: Yes, for those looking for longer rides, there are several extensive loop trails. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e927518444/sierra-de-salinas-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sierra de Salinas Loop&lt;/a&gt; is a challenging 80.2-kilometer (49.8-mile) route with over 1500 meters of elevation gain, offering a full day's adventure.

Q: What do other mountain bikers enjoy most about the trails in Sax?
A: The mountain bike trails in Sax are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 30 reviews. Riders often praise the diverse terrains, from forests to rock formations, and the variety of options available for different ability levels, from easy loops to challenging ascents.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails that pass by the Stone Arch of Elda-Petrer?
A: Yes, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31734601" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Stone Arch of Elda-Petrer – Pocico Alonso loop from Sax&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 52.1-kilometer (32.4-mile) route that specifically includes the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3004011" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Stone Arch of Elda-Petrer&lt;/a&gt; as a point of interest.

Q: Can I find trails that offer a mix of sand dunes and natural areas?
A: Certainly. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38283196" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Almortxó Sand Dunes – Las Hermosas loop from Sax&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 21.6-mile (34.8 km) path that provides a unique blend of terrain, including sand dunes and other scenic natural areas.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Sax?
A: Given Sax's location in Alicante, Spain, the region generally enjoys a Mediterranean climate. Spring (March to May) and Autumn (September to November) typically offer the most pleasant temperatures for mountain biking, avoiding the intense heat of summer and the cooler, potentially wetter days of winter.

Q: Are there any trails that explore protected natural landscapes?
A: Yes, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e927500384/paisaje-protegido-serra-del-maigmo-y-serra-del-sit-circular-desde-sax" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Paisaje Protegido Serra del Maigmó y Serra del Sit — Circular desde Sax&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult route that takes you through protected natural landscapes, offering both a challenging ride and beautiful scenery.
tips: Undoubtedly one of the most curious and striking sites in Elda-Petrer. A wonderful stone arch formed by thousands of years of water and wind erosion that today can be visited and also enjoy beautiful views!

Construction that was formerly used to collect snow to store and then be able to sell ice. Its shape is curious since it is one of the only ones with a square floor plan, most of which are known to be circular.
